name: sten-agent-skills
description: Sten agent skills: opinionated SDLC workflow, language-agnostic refactor suite, and Python refactor suite

plugins.name: stenswf
plugins.description: Sten Software Workflow bundle. Issue lifecycle (plan → ship → review → apply, with PRD-mode capstone, plus ship-light single-session lite path), PRD inception (grill-me → prd-from-grill-me → prd-to-issues). Refactor-focused skills (plan-reviewer, test-file-compaction, etc.) now live in the sibling stenswr plugin.

plugins.name: stenswr
plugins.description: StEn Software Refactor bundle. Orthogonal, language-agnostic refactor skills across four phases: understand (comprehension-to-taste), discover (improve-codebase-architecture, functional-bug-hunting, security-bug-hunting), critique (plan-reviewer), test hygiene (test-file-compaction lossless, test-file-refactor lossy).

plugins.name: python-refactor
plugins.description: Agentic Python codebase analysis suite. Measures complexity, hunts real bugs via Hypothesis PBT, proposes deep-module architecture RFCs, and generates a dependency-safe refactor plan.
